name: Tomato, Onion AND Chilli Chutney
servings: this makes enough for 4–6 people as an accompaniment. you can easily double or triple the recipe
intro: This quick and easy chutney goes well with pretty much everything. With such bright flavours and colours, it should never be left off your curry feast table.

ingredients.item: green chillies, to taste, finely chopped

method: Mix the tomatoes, onion, chillies and coriander (cilantro) in a bowl and add salt to taste. Place in the fridge for the flavours to develop for about an hour. Serve as a topping on whatever dish you want.
